data.body: COMPLETION-VERIFIER GAP FOUND + FIXED (2026-07-09): first close attempt after change 455 merged FAILED on one criterion — AC2 requires the HARNESS to write the JSON/JUnit report, but ADR 0037 §4's promised 'small script derives a JSON summary' was never committed (JUnit only existed via a manual --junitxml flag). Fix: Gerrit change 462 adds scripts/run_live_matrix.py (one command: runs the matrix with --junitxml=reports/d01e-live-matrix.junit.xml, derives reports/d01e-live-matrix.report.json with totals + per-test outcome/duration + all_green, exits with pytest's rc) and ADR 0037 §4 now names it. Verified offline: 12 passed / 0 failed / JSON derived / no leak log; ruff+mypy clean. Will close once 462 has LLM-Review +1 and Verified +1 and is submitted.
